name: Shortbread Cookies
recipeInstructions:
This makes 24 COOKIES - that would serve very few, if they are as good as
they sound! Cream butter in a mixer until smooth. Add confectioners' sugar and beat until light and fluffy. Mix flour and salt and add, combining thoroughly. Roll with a rolling pin about 1/4 inch thick, cut into rectangles (I prefer flowers or animals), place on an ungreased baking sheet, and prick with a fork. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes until lightly browned around the edges. Cool on a rack. (Dusting with a little sugar before baking—perhaps even colored sugar if for grandchildren—is optional.)
